tools.name: get_daily_prompt
tools.description: Get today's WriteFlow writing prompt — the daily creative-writing prompt from writeflow.ink, with its WriteFlow day number and how to respond (100, 250 or 500 words).

tools.name: get_contest_info
tools.description: Get the current WriteFlow weekly writing contest: prize, this week's entry window, entry count, and how responses are ranked and the winner chosen.
